EVOLUTION.title: Evolution
EVOLUTION.description: This card gains [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. After an Attack is played, permanently increase its damage by [blue]2[/blue]. After a Skill is played, permanently increase its Block by [blue]2[/blue]. After a Power is played, permanently reduce its Energy cost by [blue]1[/blue].
SPONSOR_COMPOSITE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Stacked Enchantments
SPONSOR_COMPOSITE_ENCHANTMENT.descriptio: This card has multiple enchantments. See the tips below for each individual effect.
